title: Refinement: KB-292
description:
Need a way to run these scripts from the dashboard

Refines: KB-292

log.outcome: This is a well-structured specification that correctly identifies existing patterns and follows project conventions. All referenced files exist at the specified paths, and the proposed API/UI patterns align with established dashboard conventions (WorkflowStepManager, TerminalModal). The testing requirements demand real automated tests with proper assertions. Minor clarifications would help but are not blocking.
